name: meetup-pp-mcp
description: Find public Meetup software-development networking events, with a raw GraphQL escape hatch.

meetup_graphql_search_bearer_auth.title: MEETUP_GRAPHQL_SEARCH_BEARER_AUTH
meetup_graphql_search_bearer_auth.description: Optional bearer token for account-specific Meetup GraphQL fields. Public event search does not require it.
